name: CleanNzbName
author: evenwebb
about: Scan script: strip common indexer/obfuscation/cross-post tails from NZB filenames before queuing.
requirements: This script requires Python 3.8 and above to be installed on your system.
description: Removes tails like -Obfuscated, -NZBGeek, -xpost, [TGx], -BUYMORE, and many other indexer tags.
Uses compiled patterns with multi-pass passes so stacked suffixes still clean up.
Configure below, then Save changes in NZBGet so options are written to the config and passed to the script (NZBPO_*).

options.name: DryRun
description: Log the cleaned name only; do not print [NZB] NZBNAME= (no rename in NZBGet).

options.name: ExtraSuffixes
description: Comma-separated extra literal suffixes to strip (without the .nzb extension), e.g. -MyIndexer,-Foo.

options.name: LegacyD3Strip
description: Opt-in legacy Clean.py regex (optional -???? before .nzb). Can false-positive on real release tokens.
